system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonkho_sum_getall3","body":"CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TR_TONKHO_SUM_GETALL3]
(
  @kieuxem nvarchar(10),
  @makho nvarchar(50),
  @trangthai int
)
AS
BEGIN
	/* trạng thái
	-1: Tất cả
	0: số lượng lớn hơn 0
	1: số lượng nhỏ hơn 0
	2: số lượng bằng 0
	*/
	DECLARE @sql nvarchar(max)
	DECLARE @sql_trangthai nvarchar(2000)
	DECLARE @sql_makho nvarchar(2000)

	IF @trangthai = 0
	  SET @sql_trangthai = ' WHERE A.soluong > 0 '
	ELSE IF @trangthai = 1
	  SET @sql_trangthai = ' WHERE A.soluong < 0 '
	ELSE IF @trangthai = 2
	  SET @sql_trangthai = ' WHERE A.soluong = 0 '
	ELSE IF @trangthai = -1
	  SET @sql_trangthai = ' WHERE A.soluong = A.soluong '

	SET @sql_makho = ' AND (A.makho = ''' + @makho + ''')'

	SET @sql = '
	SELECT A.mavt, B.mota, B.quycach, B.mausac, B.nhom, 
	  B.van_mat1, B.van_mat2, B.tieuchuan, B.van_tieuchuan,
	  B.dvt, B.soluong1kg, B.dacdiem,
	  A.makho, A.soluong, A.soluong_toithieu, A.ghichu, NULL as mancc, NULL as tenncc,
	  B.dayy, B.rong, B.dai
	FROM tr_tonkho_sum A
	  INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.mavt = B.mavt
	' + @sql_trangthai

	IF @kieuxem = 'WHS'
	BEGIN
	  SET @sql = @sql + @sql_makho + ' ORDER BY B.mota'
	END

	EXECUTE sp_executesql @sql
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":[],"writesTables":[],"flags":["dynamic-sql"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
